sources: Elicit vs Scite vs ResearchRabbit comparisons (2025-2026)
assumptions: Primary personas inferred from competitor marketing and CHI/ACL demo papers; no direct ScholarPulse user interviews yet.
Mobile/offline expectations extrapolated from Semantic Reader and PWA competitor claims.
Timeline trust sensitivity estimated from Scite/Elicit trust literature; not validated with our users.

codeMaturity.api: broad endpoint coverage; build/typecheck failing per QC
codeMaturity.web: desk flow scaffold; section pages minimal; no real PDF viewer
codeMaturity.publicPages: Worker public routes exist; web public routes absent in final

marketPainPoints.description: Researchers juggle separate tools for discovery, library organization, and monitoring new papers; each handoff costs manual effort.
marketPainPoints.evidence: WisPaper (2025) identifies three-stage fragmentation: search engines, reference managers, alert services.

marketPainPoints.description: BibTeX/RIS/Zotero imports often flatten folder hierarchies, lose attachments/annotations, or fail on large libraries without chunking.
marketPainPoints.evidence: Zotero forums 2024-2025; Paperpile-to-Zotero migration tools exist because built-in importers lose structure.

marketPainPoints.description: Personalized feeds require onboarding signals; users abandon when initial recommendations feel random.
marketPainPoints.evidence: Scholar Inbox ACL 2025 demo emphasizes onboarding + active learning for cold start.

marketPainPoints.description: Scite excels at supports/contradicts context but does not help find, screen, or organize papers end-to-end.
marketPainPoints.evidence: Elicit vs Scite 2026 comparison: complementary gaps on both sides.

marketPainPoints.description: AI table/data extraction fails on non-standard layouts, scanned PDFs, and non-English papers; users must verify manually.
marketPainPoints.evidence: Elicit 2026 review: extraction drops on complex tables and OCR PDFs.

marketPainPoints.description: Citation graph tools limit seed inputs, show stale data, or overload servers; discovery depth is constrained.
marketPainPoints.evidence: Connected Papers: single seed, graph cache overload; ResearchRabbit MAG stopped 2021.

marketPainPoints.description: Static PDFs are hard on mobile, screen readers, and small viewports; split-view back-and-forth increases cognitive load.
marketPainPoints.evidence: Semantic Reader Project (AI2): static PDF barriers for mobile and a11y.

marketPainPoints.description: Even strong discovery engines offer limited sort/filter depth for niche domains and non-English corpora.
marketPainPoints.evidence: Semantic Scholar 2025 review: uneven coverage, limited filter granularity.

frictionPoints.issue: Desk uses PDF placeholder, not real PDF.js viewer — core read/trace loop feels fake
frictionPoints.userImpact: Cannot validate marker click, snippet crop, or split-view in production-like conditions.
frictionPoints.codeEvidence: apps/web/components/paper/DocumentPane.tsx uses pdf-placeholder div; apps/web/app/page.tsx sample text blocks only.
frictionPoints.suggestedFix: Wire DocumentPane to PDF.js stack with proxy fetch, marker layer, and snippet fast-path per plan.

frictionPoints.issue: Auth is demo localStorage x-user-id; no Supabase session gate
frictionPoints.userImpact: Onboarding confusion, no secure library scope, GDPR delete untestable from real UX.
frictionPoints.codeEvidence: apps/web/lib/api/client.ts DEFAULT_USER_ID=demo-user; no middleware.ts in scholarpulse-final.
frictionPoints.suggestedFix: Ship cf-pages-auth middleware with JWT verify and profile bootstrap.

frictionPoints.issue: Library import/upload missing — users cannot migrate from Zotero
frictionPoints.userImpact: Switching cost blocks adoption; matches top Zotero forum pain (structure + attachments lost).
frictionPoints.codeEvidence: No /api/library/import or /api/papers/upload in apps/api/src/index.ts; library page is collections+resolve only.
frictionPoints.suggestedFix: Implement bib-rs-import with chunked parse, unknown-DOI ingest queue, import progress UI.

frictionPoints.issue: Timeline/cite trust opaque — no confidence tier or intent badges in UI
frictionPoints.userImpact: Users will not trust AI-linked snippets without supports/contradicts/medium-high badges (Scite baseline).
frictionPoints.codeEvidence: TimelineTab exists but relation_type/confidence_tier surfacing not verified in web; colab pass5 intent stubbed.
frictionPoints.suggestedFix: Show confidence_tier + relation_type on timeline cards; filter toggle for high-only.

frictionPoints.issue: Feed relevance opaque — reason string only, no onboarding wizard
frictionPoints.userImpact: Cold-start feed feels random; Scholar Inbox shows users need guided interest setup.
frictionPoints.codeEvidence: apps/web/app/feed/page.tsx lists score/reason; watch page is comma-separated textarea only.
frictionPoints.suggestedFix: Onboarding: seed from library DOIs + topic pickers; show why each item matched (topic/cite neighbor/semantic).

frictionPoints.issue: Annotations detached from PDF — form-based notes page, no highlight overlay
frictionPoints.userImpact: Notes feel like a separate app; breaks read-annotate-trace loop users expect from Zotero/ResearchRabbit.
frictionPoints.codeEvidence: apps/web/app/notes/page.tsx creates fixed normRect; no PDF overlay integration on desk.
frictionPoints.suggestedFix: Annotation layer on PDF.js with select-to-highlight and note popup.

frictionPoints.issue: GET /api/cite/elements missing from Worker — overlay falls back to mock
frictionPoints.userImpact: Figure/table click-to-timeline (unique differentiator) cannot work against real backend.
frictionPoints.codeEvidence: apps/web/app/api/cite/elements/route.ts mock fallback; grep shows no elements route in Worker index.ts.
frictionPoints.suggestedFix: Add Worker route querying cite_nodes by doi/page/element_type; remove mock default in production.

frictionPoints.issue: Build/typecheck failing — product not shippable to real users
frictionPoints.userImpact: Any user testing hits broken deploy artifacts.
frictionPoints.suggestedFix: Fix type errors blocking build; add CI gate before user beta.

frictionPoints.issue: PDF load latency and publisher throttling unhandled in UX
frictionPoints.userImpact: Cold snippet render >2s and 429 errors feel like product failure.
frictionPoints.codeEvidence: Proxy worker exists; desk has no loading/error/retry states for publisher_throttled.
frictionPoints.suggestedFix: Progressive loading UI, retry backoff messaging, warm-cache indicator.

frictionPoints.issue: Mobile/responsive desk not implemented — PDF split unusable on phone
frictionPoints.userImpact: Semantic Reader notes increasing mobile access; static split layout fails.
frictionPoints.codeEvidence: Plan marks dark-mode-pwa completed but desk-shell has no bottom-sheet/touch gestures in final web.
frictionPoints.suggestedFix: CanvasPanel bottom-sheet, pinch zoom, single-pane timeline on narrow viewports.

frictionPoints.issue: Search filters exist in API but no filter UI
frictionPoints.userImpact: Power users expect year/citation/journal/topic filters (Semantic Scholar/Scite baseline).
frictionPoints.codeEvidence: apps/api/src/index.ts /api/search supports year_from, min_citations, etc.; no search page in final web.
frictionPoints.suggestedFix: Add /search page with filter chips and sort options wired to hybrid search API.

frictionPoints.issue: Public share pages absent in scholarpulse-final web
frictionPoints.userImpact: Cannot share timeline/cite links with collaborators (expected from Scite/Elicit/Connected Papers).
frictionPoints.codeEvidence: Worker has /api/public/* routes; apps/web has no app/paper, app/cite, app/timeline routes.
frictionPoints.suggestedFix: Port public read-only pages from legacy repo or implement in final web app.

frictionPoints.issue: Colab pipeline ML stubs — cite graph quality not production-grade
frictionPoints.userImpact: False-positive edges erode trust faster than missing features.
frictionPoints.codeEvidence: colab/pipeline/README.md: FAISS, embedding, reranker, intent still stubbed.
frictionPoints.suggestedFix: Complete colab-pipeline-8pass with real models + cite-quality-eval gate >=0.95.

frictionPoints.issue: Channels/detail placeholder — no unified feed+library split for projects
frictionPoints.userImpact: Project-scoped reading (thesis chapter, grant) stays manual.
frictionPoints.suggestedFix: Channel = filtered event stream + library subset; wire collections + feed merge.

frictionPoints.issue: No browser extension for in-context cite badges
frictionPoints.userImpact: Daily workflow stays on Google Scholar/PubMed without ScholarPulse context.
frictionPoints.suggestedFix: MV3 extension with Add to Library + intent counts on Scholar/PubMed.

frictionPoints.userImpact: Travel/offline reading fails despite competitor PWA claims.
frictionPoints.codeEvidence: IndexedDB cache helpers referenced in README; no service worker verification in web app tree.
frictionPoints.suggestedFix: Validate manifest + SW caches visited PDFs; offline badge in library.

frictionPoints.issue: Profile/settings local-only — account delete UX missing
frictionPoints.userImpact: GDPR expectation unmet; settings changes do not persist across devices.
frictionPoints.codeEvidence: apps/web/app/profile/page.tsx and settings/page.tsx TODO for backend bind.
frictionPoints.suggestedFix: Wire DELETE /api/user/me with soft-confirm modal in settings.

frictionPoints.issue: Marker click discoverability — users may not know only [12] spans are clickable
frictionPoints.userImpact: First-session confusion if affordance (underline, tooltip) is weak on real PDF text layer.
frictionPoints.codeEvidence: MarkerTextBlock on sample strings; real PdfTextLayer integration not in final desk.
frictionPoints.suggestedFix: First-run coach mark on first marker hover; consistent tooltip 'Show timeline'.

unmetWants.want: One-click Zotero/BibTeX import preserving folders and tags
unmetWants.marketSignal: Zotero migration threads + Paperpile migration tooling demand

unmetWants.want: Real PDF reading with citation marker click and split-view sync
unmetWants.marketSignal: Semantic Reader + our unique auto split differentiator

unmetWants.want: Sentence-level citation intent (supports/contradicts/method) visible while reading
Personal PDF upload for closed-access papers
unmetWants.marketSignal: Elicit, Zotero, ResearchRabbit all support user PDFs

unmetWants.want: Daily personalized feed with clear match reasons
unmetWants.marketSignal: Scholar Inbox daily digest + WisPaper AI Feeds loop

unmetWants.want: TLDR / quick summary on paper cards before opening PDF
unmetWants.marketSignal: Semantic Scholar TLDR; Elicit extraction summaries

unmetWants.want: In-browser extension showing cite impact on Scholar/PubMed

unmetWants.marketSignal: Unique vs all competitors; plan differentiator

unmetWants.want: Advanced search filters (year, citations, journal, topic, author)
BibTeX/RIS export from library and cite subgraph

unmetWants.marketSignal: Scite/Elicit alerts; Scholar Inbox habit loop

unmetWants.want: Author/lab network and topic evolution exploration
unmetWants.marketSignal: ResearchRabbit + unique topic evolution in plan
Users demand correction when AI cites wrong (assumption from Scite trust model)

gapMatrix.userExpectation: Semantic search + filters + feed + graph expansion
gapMatrix.have: Hybrid /api/search with filters; /api/feed; /api/recommend; no search UI

gapMatrix.userExpectation: Fast PDF load, markers, split-view, mobile
gapMatrix.have: Desk scaffold, proxy worker, render optimization code paths

gapMatrix.userExpectation: Click marker -> timeline -> intent badges -> open target
gapMatrix.have: Timeline API + UI tab; intent/colab stub; mock PDF
Collections API; export endpoint; no import
Interests API; saved_searches API; minimal watch UI
Worker public routes; web public pages missing

items.title: Fix web/api build blockers
items.rationale: QC errors block any user beta.

items.title: Real PDF.js desk + marker layer
items.rationale: Core product promise; top friction FP-01.

items.title: Supabase auth middleware
items.rationale: Secure user scope before library data.

items.title: Worker /api/cite/elements + timeline badges
items.rationale: Unblocks figure click + removes mock overlay.

items.title: BibTeX/RIS import MVP
items.rationale: Top unmet want; Zotero migration pain.

uniqueStrengths: Coord-based sentence timeline with auto split + sync pulse (no edge UI)
Figure/table overlay click to timeline (when backend wired)
Privacy-preserving coord-only server (no full text stored)
parityGaps: Real PDF viewer in production web
Public share pages in final web app
